lairWindow_gate_detail.comment: C83 gate correctly applied. Consistent with candles (1159), dust (1162), cauldron (1165).

mg_ombres.status: PARTIAL — only lose dispatched on collision; no unlock SFX on clean corridor completion
mg_ombres.note: No SFX fires when player completes corridor without colliding. All other minigames dispatch a positive sound on win path.

sfx_reference_pattern.context: Dispatched inside onKeyDown handler and onClick handler after a word is picked.

mg_fouille_notes: No open issues. Cleanup is complete: foundTimeout, timerInterval, animFrame all cleared in both cleanup() paths (lines 293-295 and 439-441). SFX dispatches at lines 231, 235, 265, 270 cover wrong-click, correct-find, and timeout-loss cases.
mg_equilibre_notes: No open issues. Cleanup clears timerInterval and animFrame at lines 202-203 and 370-371. SFX dispatches at lines 260-261 cover zone-enter (unlock) and zone-exit (lose).

world_level_targets_handled.comment: C83 — spotlight target added at world level, not in group, not reached by traverse
C35 — moon target not reached by traverse

traverse_coverage.Points: geometry.dispose() + material.dispose() at lines 1216-1223 (same branch as Mesh)
traverse_coverage.dust.points: Points added directly via scene.add(dust.points) at line 779 — COVERED by traverse Points branch
traverse_coverage.cauldronHit: Mesh (new Mesh at line 788) added directly via scene.add at line 793 — COVERED by traverse Mesh branch
traverse_coverage.AmbientLight_HemisphereLight_PointLight: Lights have no geometry/material to dispose. GPU resources freed by renderer.dispose(). Standard Three.js practice — not a leak.

dispose_analysis.verdict: No uncovered leaks detected. All world-space Object3D targets are explicitly removed before traverse. All Mesh/Points added directly to scene are covered by traverse branches.

new_bugs.line: endGame() win path (after line 214 collision block)
new_bugs.description: mg_ombres dispatches only the 'lose' SFX on collision (line 214). There is no 'unlock' or positive SFX dispatched when the player completes the corridor successfully. All other minigames dispatch a positive sound on win outcome (mg_sang_froid line 244, mg_combat_rituel line 268, mg_course line 231). The absence creates a silent win, breaking audio feedback consistency.
new_bugs.fix: In the endGame() branch that resolves with a non-zero score (player survived without critical collision), add: window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('merlin_sfx', { detail: { sound: 'unlock' } })); — matching the pattern from mg_negociation.ts lines 110-113.

sfx_silent_minigames: mg_ombres (win path only — collision lose SFX is present)
